tasks.description: Harvest Rabi crops like Mustard and French beans.
Select and demarcate new Jhum plots. Begin clearing light brush.
Start nurseries for Tree Tomato and early chilies.
Major felling of trees in Jhum fields. Drying of debris starts.
Sow Potato and early Ginger in lower altitude regions.
Burning of dried debris in Jhum fields. Careful fire control required.
Early sowing of Maize and Job's Tears in lower belts.
Sow King Chili (Raja Mircha) and local Ginger.
Sowing of Upland Rice begins in mid-altitude regions.
Clearing of debris after burn (secondary cleaning).
Main sowing of Upland Rice and Millets in Jhum fields.
Sow Naga Cucumber and local beans/pulses.
First weeding of early sown Jhum plots.
Sow Axone (Soybean) for Kharif season.
Intensive weeding in Rice fields. Check for pests.
Second weeding. Monitor rainfall levels for drainage.
Harvest early Maize and some local greens.
Harvest Naga Cucumber and early chilies.
Final weeding in late-maturing rice plots.
Harvest Millets (Foxtail) and Job's Tears.
Start nurseries for winter vegetables (Cabbage, Cauliflower).
Main harvest of Jhum Rice begins. Processing and storage.
Start sowing Rabi crops: Mustard, Peas, Potato in wet terrace fields.
Complete Rice harvest. Harvest Soybean (Axone).
Sow local pulses and winter forage crops.
Harvest Oranges and other winter fruits.
Post-harvest processing. Seed selection and preservation.
